hero.description: Türkoğlu Shipyard, with over 60 years of maritime roots, is a leading shipyard operating on a 20,699 m² area in Yalova since 2007, following its experience in Golden Horn and Tuzla.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Strong Experience, Solid Foundations
about.description: Türkoğlu Shipyard is one of Turkey's leading shipyard companies with over 60 years of experience. Since 2007, operating on a 20,699 m² modern infrastructure in Yalova, we provide high-quality shipbuilding and maritime services with an experienced engineering team and production processes complying with international quality standards.

projects.subtitle: Our Projects
projects.title: Featured Works
projects.description: Some of our recently completed and ongoing projects.

kurumsal.subtitle: Corporate
kurumsal.title: Get to Know Us
kurumsal.historyText: Türkoğlu Shipyard has carried its deep-rooted history in the maritime sector from Golden Horn and Tuzla to the present day, with more than 60 years of experience.
kurumsal.historyText2: We have been continuing our operations in Yalova since 2007. With a total shipyard working area of 20,699 m², an annual steel processing capacity of 13,318 tons, and two giant slipway facilities capable of serving ships up to 213 meters in length, we provide comprehensive responses to all needs of the sector.
kurumsal.valuesDesc: We work based on these values in every project.
kurumsal.visionText: To become a global brand that produces at international standards in Turkish maritime industry, environmentally conscious and innovative.
kurumsal.missionText: To be a trusted business partner of our customers by providing ship construction, maintenance and repair services at international quality standards, and to provide a safe and growth-oriented working environment for our employees.

values.qualityDesc: We work at international standards with a zero-defect principle.
values.safetyDesc: Occupational safety and environmental protection form the basis of all our activities.
values.innovationDesc: We closely follow technology and act with the principle of continuous improvement.
values.reliabilityDesc: We earn our customers' trust through on-time delivery and transparent communication.
values.sustainabilityDesc: We invest in the future with environmentally conscious production processes.
values.teamworkDesc: Behind our success lies a strong and harmonious team spirit.

services.newBuildDesc: We provide new shipbuilding services at international standards and with IACS/Turk Loydu approval. We can build various steel and aluminum marine vessels up to 20,000 DWT capacities. We manufacture all types of marine vessels turnkey, from passenger ships to tugboats and barges.
services.newBuildF2: Passenger Ships, Tugboats, Barges, and Dredgers
services.newBuildF4: Annual Steel Processing Capacity of 13,318 Tons
services.maintenanceDesc: With our area capable of serving ships 80-90 meters long simultaneously, we offer planned maintenance, slipway repair, and emergency response services. We provide fully equipped maintenance and repair for ships up to 4,000 DWT and 600 tons light weight.
services.maintenanceF2: Max 30 Days Repair Time on Slipway
services.refitDesc: We extend the economic lifespan of your vessels by equipping them with the latest technology. We are here for your interior renovation, system modernization, fuel efficiency improvement and eco-friendly conversion projects.

hizmetlerimiz.subtitle: Our Services
hizmetlerimiz.title: What We Do
hizmetlerimiz.areaDesc: We offer a wide range of services from new construction to maintenance, refit and modernization.
hizmetlerimiz.ctaTitle: Get a Quote for Your Project
hizmetlerimiz.ctaDesc: Contact our expert team for new construction, maintenance or refit needs.

footer.description: With over 60 years of deep-rooted history, Türkoğlu Shipyard is a sector leader providing shipbuilding, maintenance, and refit services in a 20,699 m² area in Yalova, following its operations in Golden Horn and Tuzla.

referanslar.title: Our References
referanslar.subtitle: Classification Societies
referanslar.description: International classification societies and solution partners we collaborate with in our projects.

turk_loydu.name: Türk Loydu
turk_loydu.desc: Türk Loydu, an independent classification and conformity assessment body based in Turkey, audits compliance with national and international standards in shipbuilding. It is one of our most important partners representing domestic engineering assurance, ensuring high safety and quality in our shipyard projects.

prs.name: Polski Rejestr Statków (PRS)
prs.desc: Poland-based PRS, with a deep-rooted history in the maritime sector, is an internationally recognized and respected classification society. It is a reliable certification partner in our European standard projects with its rigorous audits to ensure life, property, and environmental safety during shipbuilding processes.

irclass.name: IRClass (Indian Register of Shipping)
irclass.desc: IRClass, a member of the International Association of Classification Societies (IACS), is a prestigious inspection body serving globally in the maritime industry. It supports sustainability in shipbuilding with innovative and rule-based inspection processes and offers internationally valid certifications for our ships sailing in global waters.

rina.name: RINA
rina.desc: Italian-origin RINA is a global leader offering ship classification and certification services with over a century of experience in the maritime sector. It is a respected reference we frequently collaborate with in our modern ship projects, especially with its high standards in technological innovations, energy efficiency, and environmental sustainability.

rs.name: Russian Maritime Register of Shipping (RS)
rs.desc: Russian Maritime Register of Shipping is a globally specialized authority, particularly in the classification of ships suitable for harsh marine conditions and icy waters. It registers durability and quality in shipbuilding on the international arena with its detailed inspections where safety standards are kept at the highest level.

dnv.name: DNV
dnv.desc: DNV, one of the world's largest classification societies, is a pioneering institution setting safety, sustainability, and digitalization standards in the maritime industry. With its certifications that maximize risk management and environmental performance in shipbuilding processes, it is one of the strongest assurances of our high-tech projects in global waters.

bv.name: Bureau Veritas (BV)
bv.desc: Founded in 1828, Bureau Veritas is a globally recognized industry leader in quality, health, safety, and environmental (QHSE) management and ship classification. By auditing full compliance with international rules from the initial stage of shipbuilding to its delivery, it officially verifies our quality-oriented production approach on a global scale.
